v01.define: Client is not due for MCV0 Case 2
v01.description: The first conjunction in Case 2 is 'or' instead of the required 'and' between MCV0 not administered and age 6-9 months.

v02.define: Client is not due for MCV0 Case 2
v02.description: The conjunction before live vaccine administered is 'or' instead of the required 'and'.

v03.define: Client is not due for MCV0
v03.description: The aggregate not-due define combines Case 1 and Case 2 with 'and' instead of the required 'or'.

v04.define: Client is not due for MCV0 Case 4
v04.description: Case 4 should reference Encounter."MCV0 was administered" but references Encounter."MCV0 was not administered".

v05.define: Client is not due for MCV0 Case 2
v05.description: Case 2 should require Encounter."MCV0 was not administered" but references Encounter."MCV0 was administered".

v06.define: Client is not due for MCV0 Case 1
v06.description: Case 1 should use age less than 6 months, but uses Encounter."Client's age is less than 9 months".

v07.define: Client is not due for MCV0 Case 3
v07.description: Case 3 should use age more than or equal to 9 months, but uses Encounter."Client's age is more than or equal to 12 months".

v08.define: Client is not due for MCV0 Case 2
v08.description: Case 2 is missing the required age precondition Encounter."Client's age is between 6 months and 9 months".

v09.description: The Consider MCV0 define is missing the required precondition Encounter."No live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks".

v10.description: The Consider MCV0 define is missing the required age precondition Encounter."Client's age is between 6 months and 9 months".

v11.description: The Measles39.1 test branch uses Patient.id != 'Measles39.1' instead of Patient.id = 'Measles39.1'.

v12.description: The Measles37.3 test branch uses Patient.id != 'Measles37.3' instead of Patient.id = 'Measles37.3'.
